lines.text_source: The caravan continues on its slow, inexorable roll\n

lines.speaker: Haku

lines.base_translation: mas agora restam apenas algumas pedras soltas.

lines.text_source: Trees have taken root in the days since, roots\n

lines.text_source: snaking under the surface and breaking up the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: serpenteando pelo chão e destruindo o\n

lines.text_source: path.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: caminho.

lines.text_source: So this is what Ukon meant when he said the road\n
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: would be rough...

lines.base_translation: seria difícil...

lines.text_source: The snowmelt has sunken into the dirt, too,\n
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: forcing everyone to trudge through the thick mud.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: forçando todos a caminhar pelo barro pesado.

lines.text_source: Mysterious duo right
lines.speaker: SISTEMA

lines.text_source: Mysterious duo left

lines.text_source: *Squish-squish-squish*...

lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: comentar a presença dos gêmeos misteriosos

lines.text_source: This is... Ah, forget it.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: desistir de comentar sobre os gêmeos
lines.base_translation: Isso é... Ah, deixa pra lá.

lines.text_source: No matter what I say, it's not like they're gonna\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: explicar que não adianta falar com os gêmeos
lines.base_translation: Não importa o que eu diga, eles não vão\n

lines.text_source: reply. It's pointless to even worry about it.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: responder. Não adianta nem se preocupar.

lines.text_source: ...Man, though. It's getting dark.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ...Nossa, tá ficando escuro.

lines.text_source: effectively.

lines.base_translation: completamente.

lines.intent: reclamar do ar ruim da floresta

lines.text_source: which chilleth my very bones in this place...

lines.text_source: Maroro mutters uneasily as he shoots furtive\n

lines.text_source: glances about, peering into the trees.

lines.intent: evocar memória de um pergaminho assustador

lines.base_translation: outrora li com grande temor.

lines.text_source: this one, whence he met a woman of beauty quite\n
lines.speaker: Maroro
lines.base_translation: tal como esta, quando encontrou uma mulher de\n

lines.text_source: unmatch'd.

lines.intent: descrever a beleza da mulher do conto
lines.base_translation: beleza inigualável.

lines.text_source: a nugwisomkami! That which feasteth upon the flesh\n

lines.text_source: of wayfarers.

lines.text_source: I-I see...

lines.base_translation: A-Ah é...

lines.text_source: Not only is it kind of a generic story, but a\n

lines.intent: explicar por que não ficou com medo

lines.base_translation: resumo curto assim não vai me dar medo\n

lines.text_source: into my heart.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: algum.

lines.text_source: Hm?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hum?

lines.base_translation: Uma figura na estrada à frente chama minha atenção...

lines.intent: descrever pessoa desconhecida na beira da estrada
lines.base_translation: Alguém desconhecido está na beira da estrada,\n

lines.text_source: Next to them, a wagon much like one of our own has\n

lines.base_translation: tombado, bloqueando a estrada.

lines.text_source: Girl
lines.speaker: sistema
lines.base_translation: Garota

lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: com um sorriso de desculpas.

lines.intent: perguntar o que a garota precisa

lines.text_source: My cart's wheels are stuck in a ditch, and I can't\n

lines.intent: explicar que a carroça está presa

lines.base_translation: buraco e não consigo soltar sozinha.

lines.text_source: Quite a bind you're in, huh. All right, men, let's\n

lines.intent: aceitar ajudar e chamar os homens
lines.base_translation: Que aperto, hein. Tudo bem, rapazes, vamos\n

lines.text_source: help her out!
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.base_translation: ajudar ela!

lines.base_translation: Coorte do Ukon

lines.text_source: Sir!

lines.text_source: They seem a little eager to please because it's a\n

lines.intent: comentar que os homens estão animados demais porque é uma mulher

lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: agradar só porque é uma mulher bonita. Típico.

lines.speaker: Haku

lines.base_translation: Relaxa, não to falando sério. Só perguntei\n

lines.base_translation: se parece com ela.

lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: O-One supposeth as much...

lines.base_translation: H-Há de se convir...

lines.text_source: She possesseth some charm, but no. Milady is not\n
lines.speaker: Maroro
lines.intent: analisar se a garota seria a criatura disfarçada

lines.text_source: such a beauty as the fell creatures might\n
lines.speaker: Maroro
lines.base_translation: bela o suficiente para que tais criaturas\n

lines.text_source: impersonate.
lines.speaker: Maroro
lines.base_translation: se façam passar.

lines.text_source: Forsooth, let us be thankful for thy homeliness...

lines.base_translation: Não, nada...

lines.base_translation: pedido?

lines.text_source: Mm, put down your weapons and leave all your\n

lines.text_source: other belongings behind.

lines.base_translation: outros pertences para trás.

lines.speaker: Rulutieh

lines.text_source: Huh?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Hein?

lines.text_source: Put down your weapons, and leave your belongings\n

lines.base_translation: Larguem suas armas e deixem seus pertences\n

lines.text_source: behind.
lines.speaker: Garota
lines.base_translation: para trás.

lines.text_source: *FWOOSH*
lines.speaker: SISTEMA

lines.intent: descrever a lona sendo puxada revelando homens armados

lines.text_source: Ukon's men who had approached the caravan to help\n

lines.text_source: lift it are quickly subdued and pinned down...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: são rapidamente dominados e imobilizados...

lines.text_source: Ah--!
lines.speaker: Ankuam
lines.base_translation: Ah--!

lines.text_source: Wh--!
lines.speaker: Ankuam
lines.base_translation: Qu--!

lines.text_source: Don't move.

lines.base_translation: Não se mexam.

lines.text_source: Their numbers are only half ours, but every one of\n

lines.base_translation: com os arcos tensionados e prontos.

lines.text_source: We'll have to play this very, very carefully.

lines.intent: concluir que precisam agir com cautela

lines.text_source: M-Master Haku...!

lines.base_translation: M-Mestre Haku...!

lines.base_translation: Maroro começa a tremer visivelmente com o\n

lines.text_source: development.

lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: Hm. Not bad.

lines.base_translation: Hm. Nada mal.

lines.text_source: Ukon remains straight-backed and fearless, but his\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ukon se mantém ereto e impassível, mas sua\n

lines.text_source: voice is audibly stiff.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: voz está claramente tensa.

lines.text_source: Worry not. We're merely after your cargo. Your\n
lines.speaker: Garota
lines.intent: garantir que só querem a carga, não vidas
lines.base_translation: Não se preocupem. Queremos só a carga. Suas\n

lines.text_source: lives are only in danger if you decide to be\n

lines.base_translation: vidas só correm risco se resolverem ser\n

lines.text_source: idiots.

lines.base_translation: idiotas.

lines.text_source: A-Ah... Uhm...

lines.base_translation: pés da mulher.

lines.speaker: Ukon

lines.text_source: other...

lines.base_translation: si...

lines.text_source: The reality of their situation sinks in, and one\n
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: You there. You too.

lines.base_translation: grupo que está esperando por perto e atacar\n

lines.text_source: their base.
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.base_translation: a base deles.

lines.text_source: I know you've got more questions, and you deserve\n
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.intent: pedir que guardem as perguntas para depois
lines.base_translation: Sei que têm mais perguntas, e vocês merecem\n

lines.text_source: answers, but save 'em. Every minute counts, now.
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.base_translation: respostas, mas guardem. Cada minuto conta agora.

lines.text_source: Oh, no you don't. How can you suggest that so\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: protestar contra a sugestão calma de Ukon
lines.base_translation: Ei, nem pensar. Como pode sugerir isso com\n

lines.text_source: calmly?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: tanta calma?

lines.text_source: Escorting cargo I signed on for, but launching\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Escoltei a carga, tudo bem, mas atacar\n

lines.text_source: surprise attacks on bandit fortresses? C'mon,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: fortalezas de bandidos de surpresa? Ei,\n

lines.text_source: give me a break.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: dá um tempo.

lines.text_source: Yeah, I know. I'm not planning on bringing you\n
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.intent: tranquilizar Haku dizendo que não vai levá-lo
lines.base_translation: Ei, eu sei. Não planejo te levar\n

lines.text_source: along for this. Relax.
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.base_translation: junto nisso. Relaxa.

lines.text_source: Saying that, Ukon smiles.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Dito isso, Ukon sorri.

lines.text_source: Instead... I hate to ask this of you, but I need\n
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.intent: pedir um pequeno favor a Haku
lines.base_translation: Mas... odeio pedir isso a você, mas preciso\n

lines.text_source: a tiny favor.
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.base_translation: de um pequeno favor.
